title: The Shawshank Redemption
text: A banker wrongly convicted of murdering his wife is sentenced to life in a brutal prison. Over two decades he quietly befriends a fellow inmate, maintains his innocence, and uses his financial skills to help corrupt guards. Through patience and a hidden tunnel dug with a tiny rock hammer, he eventually escapes to freedom on the coast of Mexico.

title: The Godfather
text: The aging patriarch of a powerful New York crime family transfers control of his empire to his reluctant youngest son. As rivals threaten the family business, the young man transforms from a war hero who wanted nothing to do with the family into a ruthless don who consolidates power through calculated violence and betrayal.

title: The Dark Knight
text: A masked vigilante and the police form an uneasy alliance to dismantle organized crime in a sprawling city. Their plans unravel when an anarchist criminal mastermind emerges, forcing the hero to confront the thin line between justice and chaos. The city's white knight district attorney is corrupted, and the vigilante takes the blame to preserve hope.

title: Inception
text: A skilled thief who steals secrets by entering people's dreams is offered a chance to have his criminal record erased. Instead of extracting information, he must plant an idea deep in a target's subconscious. He assembles a team and builds layered dream worlds, but his own buried guilt threatens to collapse the entire operation.

title: Pulp Fiction
text: Interlocking stories follow a pair of hitmen on assignment, their mob boss employer, a boxer paid to throw a fight, and two small-time robbers. The non-linear narrative weaves together a briefcase retrieval, a deadly overdose, an unexpected encounter in a pawn shop basement, and a diner holdup into a darkly comic mosaic of Los Angeles crime.

title: Forrest Gump
text: A slow-witted but kind-hearted man from Alabama stumbles through several decades of American history. He becomes a college football star, a Vietnam War hero, a ping-pong champion, and a shrimp boat captain, all while pining for his childhood sweetheart. His simple decency carries him through events that shape the nation.

title: The Matrix
text: A computer programmer discovers that reality as he knows it is a simulated world created by machines to pacify the human population. Freed by a group of rebels, he learns he may be the prophesied one destined to end the war between humans and artificial intelligence. He must master bending the rules of the simulation to survive.

title: Fight Club
text: A depressed office worker suffering from insomnia forms an underground fight club with a charismatic soap salesman. The club grows into an anarchist movement aimed at destroying consumer culture. The narrator gradually discovers a disturbing truth about his relationship with the enigmatic leader that calls his own identity into question.

title: Interstellar
text: With Earth's crops failing and humanity facing extinction, a former pilot is recruited for a last-chance mission through a wormhole near Saturn. The crew explores distant planets searching for a new home, confronting time dilation that makes hours on one planet equal years back home. The pilot must choose between seeing his children again and saving the species.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
text: A young hobbit inherits a powerful ring that must be destroyed in the fires where it was forged. He sets out with a fellowship of elves, dwarves, men, and fellow hobbits on a perilous journey across a vast fantasy world. Dark forces pursue them relentlessly as the ring's corrupting influence tests every member of the group.

title: Goodfellas
text: A young man from a working-class neighborhood is drawn into the world of organized crime as a teenager. Rising through the ranks alongside two partners, he enjoys decades of wealth and power before paranoia, drug addiction, and betrayal bring it all crashing down. He ultimately enters witness protection, trading excitement for suburban anonymity.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
text: A young FBI trainee is assigned to interview an imprisoned cannibalistic psychiatrist to gain insight into an active serial killer case. The brilliant but manipulative prisoner offers clues in exchange for personal information about the agent. A tense psychological game develops as the trainee races to save the killer's latest victim.

title: Gladiator
text: A Roman general is betrayed by the corrupt emperor's son, who murders his family and sells him into slavery. Rising through the gladiatorial ranks, the former general fights his way to the Colosseum in Rome for a chance at vengeance against the man who destroyed his life. The roaring crowds become his unlikely path back to justice.

title: Saving Private Ryan
text: After the brutal D-Day invasion of Normandy, a captain leads a small squad behind enemy lines to find and bring home a paratrooper whose three brothers have all been killed in action. The mission raises difficult questions about risking eight lives to save one as the soldiers fight through war-torn France.

title: Schindler's List
text: A German industrialist and member of the Nazi party gradually transforms from a war profiteer into a protector of his Jewish workers during the Holocaust. Using his factory as a cover, he spends his fortune bribing officials to keep over a thousand people off the trains to the death camps.

title: The Departed
text: An undercover cop infiltrates a powerful crime syndicate while a mole from the same syndicate works inside the police department. Both organizations slowly realize they have a rat, setting off a deadly race as each infiltrator tries to identify the other before being exposed. Trust erodes from both sides.

title: WALL-E
text: A small waste-collecting robot is the last one still operating on an abandoned, garbage-covered Earth. When a sleek probe arrives to scan for plant life, the lonely robot follows it into space aboard a massive luxury starship where obese humans have lived for centuries. His determination inadvertently sparks humanity's return home.

title: Up
text: A grumpy elderly widower ties thousands of balloons to his house and flies to South America to fulfill a promise he made to his late wife. A young wilderness scout accidentally comes along for the ride. Together they encounter exotic birds, talking dogs, and a childhood hero turned villain in the remote jungle highlands.

title: The Lion King
text: A young lion cub is tricked by his jealous uncle into believing he caused his father's death. He flees into exile and grows up carefree in the wilderness with two unlikely friends. Years later he must return to reclaim his rightful place as king and confront the uncle who destroyed his family.

title: Toy Story
text: A cowboy doll who is a child's favorite toy becomes jealous when a flashy new space ranger action figure arrives. The two rivals end up lost together far from home and must cooperate to find their way back before the family moves to a new house. They discover that being owned by a child who loves them is what matters most.

title: Jurassic Park
text: A wealthy businessman invites scientists to preview his remote island theme park where dinosaurs have been cloned from ancient DNA. When a disgruntled employee sabotages the security systems during a tropical storm, the electric fences fail and the predators escape. The visitors must survive the island until rescue arrives.

title: The Truman Show
text: A man lives what he believes is a normal life in a perfect seaside town. He gradually discovers that his entire world is an elaborate television set, everyone around him is an actor, and his life has been broadcast to millions since birth. He resolves to escape the artificial dome and find the real world.

title: Spirited Away
text: A ten-year-old girl and her parents stumble into a mysterious spirit world while moving to a new town. When her parents are transformed into pigs by a witch, the girl must work in the witch's bathhouse for spirits and find a way to free her family and return to the human world.

title: Parasite
text: A poor family living in a basement apartment schemes their way into working for a wealthy family by posing as unrelated highly qualified professionals. As they enjoy the luxuries of the rich household, a hidden secret in the basement reveals an even darker layer of inequality. Class tensions explode violently during a birthday party.

title: Get Out
text: A young Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate for a weekend. Beneath the family's liberal friendliness he notices increasingly disturbing behavior from the Black servants and guests. He uncovers a horrifying conspiracy that the family has been targeting Black visitors for a sinister medical procedure.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
text: In a post-apocalyptic desert wasteland controlled by a tyrannical warlord, a captured drifter joins forces with a one-armed war captain who has smuggled the warlord's enslaved wives out in a modified war rig. A relentless high-speed chase across the desert follows as an armada of weaponized vehicles pursues them.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
text: A legendary concierge at a famous European hotel is framed for the murder of a wealthy elderly guest. With the help of his loyal lobby boy, he goes on the run while trying to prove his innocence and claim a priceless painting left to him in the victim's will. The story is told through nested layers of narrators.

title: Whiplash
text: A young jazz drummer enrolls at a prestigious music conservatory and catches the attention of a ruthless instructor. The teacher uses psychological abuse and physical intimidation to push his students beyond their limits. The relationship between student and mentor becomes an obsessive battle of wills over the price of greatness.

title: Coco
text: A young Mexican boy who dreams of becoming a musician defies his family's generations-old ban on music. On the Day of the Dead he accidentally crosses into the Land of the Dead and must seek the blessing of his deceased relatives to return home. He uncovers a long-buried family secret that changes everything.

title: Jaws
text: A massive great white shark begins attacking swimmers at a small New England beach town during peak tourist season. The police chief, a marine biologist, and a grizzled shark hunter set out on a boat to kill the creature. What begins as a simple hunt becomes a desperate fight for survival on the open ocean.

title: Alien
text: The crew of a commercial space freighter responds to a distress signal on a remote planet. One crew member is attacked by an organism that attaches to his face. After it detaches and he seems to recover, a lethal creature bursts from his chest and grows rapidly, hunting the crew through the ship's dark corridors one by one.

title: Aliens
text: A sole survivor from the first alien encounter is sent back to the infested planet with a squad of colonial marines after contact with a colony is lost. They find one surviving child and hundreds of creatures in a hive. The rescue mission turns into a desperate fight using pulse rifles and a cargo loader exosuit.

title: Back to the Future
text: A teenager accidentally travels thirty years into the past using a time machine built from a sports car by an eccentric scientist. He inadvertently prevents his parents from meeting and must arrange their first encounter at the school dance or he will cease to exist. He also must find a way to power the machine for the return trip.

title: Die Hard
text: An off-duty New York cop visits his estranged wife at her company Christmas party in a Los Angeles skyscraper. When a team of heavily armed thieves seizes the building and takes everyone hostage, the barefoot cop becomes the only person who can stop them, picking off the criminals one by one from inside the ventilation shafts.

title: Titanic
text: A young socialite engaged to a wealthy man falls in love with a penniless artist aboard the maiden voyage of the world's largest ocean liner. Their forbidden romance unfolds against the backdrop of class division as the ship strikes an iceberg and begins to sink. The disaster reveals who people truly are when survival is at stake.

title: Avatar
text: A paralyzed former marine is given a chance to walk again by remotely controlling a biological body on a lush alien moon rich in a valuable mineral. As he integrates with the indigenous population and falls in love, he must choose between following his military orders to displace the natives or defending their homeland.

title: The Avengers
text: When a powerful alien artifact falls into the hands of a vengeful demigod, a secret government agency assembles a team of extraordinary individuals. A super soldier, an armored billionaire, a Norse god, a scientist who transforms into a green giant, and two elite spies must overcome their clashing egos to repel an alien invasion of New York.

title: Black Panther
text: After the death of his father, a young prince returns to his technologically advanced but hidden African nation to assume the throne. His right to rule is challenged by a long-lost cousin raised in poverty who wants to use the nation's advanced weapons to arm oppressed people worldwide. The new king must defend his country and its secrets.

title: Joker
text: A failed comedian living with his mother in a decaying city struggles with a neurological condition that causes uncontrollable laughter. Rejected by society and cut off from mental health services, he descends into madness and violence. His transformation into a painted criminal figure accidentally sparks a citywide movement against the wealthy elite.

title: The Social Network
text: The founding story of the world's largest social media platform, told through dueling lawsuits. A brilliant but abrasive Harvard student codes a website that explodes in popularity, then faces accusations of theft from classmates who claim he stole their idea and betrayal from his best friend and co-founder who was pushed out of the company.

title: A Beautiful Mind
text: A brilliant but socially awkward mathematician at a prestigious university begins doing classified work for the government. He gradually descends into paranoid schizophrenia, unable to distinguish between real people and elaborate hallucinations. His devoted wife helps him fight to reclaim his mind, and he eventually wins the Nobel Prize for his early groundbreaking work.

title: The Prestige
text: Two rival magicians in Victorian London engage in an escalating battle to create the ultimate stage illusion. Each sabotages the other's performances with increasingly dangerous consequences. Obsession leads one to seek help from a reclusive inventor, while the other commits to a sacrifice that blurs the line between science fiction and magic.

title: No Country for Old Men
text: A hunter stumbles upon the aftermath of a drug deal gone wrong in the Texas desert and takes a satchel containing two million dollars. A relentless hitman with a captive bolt pistol tracks him across the countryside while an aging sheriff tries to make sense of the escalating violence in a changing world.

title: There Will Be Blood
text: An ambitious silver miner turned oil prospector builds a petroleum empire in early twentieth century California. His ruthless drive for wealth puts him in conflict with a young charismatic preacher in a small town sitting atop a vast oil reserve. The decades-long rivalry between greed and faith destroys both men.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
text: After a painful breakup, a woman undergoes a medical procedure to erase all memories of her ex-boyfriend. When he discovers this, he impulsively does the same. During the erasure process he relives their relationship in reverse and realizes he wants to keep the memories, fighting from inside his own mind to preserve them.

title: Memento
text: A man with severe short-term memory loss hunts for the person who attacked him and murdered his wife. Unable to form new memories, he relies on tattoos, photographs, and handwritten notes to track clues. The story is told in reverse chronological order, putting the audience in the same confused state as the protagonist.

title: The Big Lebowski
text: A laid-back Los Angeles bowler known as 'The Dude' is mistaken for a millionaire with the same name. After thugs ruin his rug, he seeks compensation and gets pulled into a convoluted kidnapping scheme involving his wealthy namesake's trophy wife. Nothing goes according to plan, and The Dude just wants his rug replaced.

title: Django Unchained
text: A freed slave teams up with a German bounty hunter traveling across the American South before the Civil War. After collecting several bounties together, they devise a scheme to rescue the freed man's wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner. The plan requires deception, violence, and navigating the horrors of slavery.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
text: A young stockbroker rises to enormous wealth through fraud and corruption on Wall Street during the early nineties. His firm manipulates penny stocks to fleece investors while he indulges in an increasingly outrageous lifestyle of drugs and excess. Federal investigators slowly close in as his empire grows more reckless.

title: Inglourious Basterds
text: During World War Two, a squad of Jewish-American soldiers conducts guerrilla operations behind enemy lines in occupied France, scalping captured soldiers to terrorize the German army. Meanwhile, a Jewish cinema owner in Paris plots her own revenge against the Nazi high command. Both plans converge at a film premiere attended by the German leadership.

title: 12 Angry Men
text: A jury of twelve men deliberates the fate of a teenager accused of murdering his father. Initially eleven vote guilty, but one dissenting juror methodically raises reasonable doubts about the evidence. Over hours of heated argument in a sweltering room, he persuades the others to reconsider their assumptions and biases.

title: Lagaan
text: Villagers in colonial India are challenged by a British officer to a cricket match. If they win, their crushing land tax will be waived for three years. If they lose, the tax triples. A young farmer assembles a ragtag team of untrained villagers, including an untouchable and a woman, to learn the foreign game and fight back.

title: 3 Idiots
text: Two friends search for a long-lost college buddy while recalling their days at a prestigious Indian engineering institute. Flashbacks reveal how their unconventional friend challenged the rigid education system, clashed with the authoritarian dean, and inspired everyone around him to pursue passion over grades. The search leads to an unexpected reunion in rural Ladakh.

title: Dangal
text: A former amateur wrestling champion from a small Indian village trains his two daughters to become world-class wrestlers despite fierce social opposition. He defies gender norms and community ridicule, building a mud pit in his yard and putting the girls through grueling daily training. Both daughters eventually win gold medals at international competitions.

title: Dil Chahta Hai
text: Three inseparable college friends in Mumbai graduate and drift apart as their lives take different directions. One falls for an older divorced woman, another enters an arranged engagement, and the third refuses to believe in love at all. A falling out separates them until circumstances in Goa bring them back together.

title: Rang De Basanti
text: A young British filmmaker comes to India to make a documentary about freedom fighters who were executed during the independence movement. She casts a group of carefree Delhi college students in the roles. As they immerse themselves in the revolutionaries' stories, they are transformed and take drastic action against modern corruption.

title: Amélie
text: A shy waitress in a Montmartre café decides to secretly improve the lives of people around her through small, elaborate acts of kindness. She reunites a man with his lost childhood treasure, nudges her reclusive neighbor to exhibit his art, and schemes to connect lonely strangers. Finding her own happiness proves the hardest project.

title: Cinema Paradiso
text: A famous Italian filmmaker returns to his hometown for a funeral and recalls his childhood friendship with the projectionist at the local movie theater. Through flashbacks spanning decades, we see how films shaped his imagination, how his mentor guided him, and why he left and never returned until now.

title: City of God
text: Two boys growing up in a violent favela outside Rio de Janeiro take divergent paths. One becomes a photographer trying to document the reality around him, while the other rises as a ruthless drug lord controlling the neighborhood. Their stories intersect as gang wars escalate and the photographer's camera becomes both his escape and his weapon.

title: Pan's Labyrinth
text: In 1944 Spain, a young girl moves with her pregnant mother to live with her new stepfather, a sadistic army captain hunting guerrilla fighters. She discovers an ancient stone labyrinth and meets a faun who tells her she is a lost princess. She must complete three dangerous tasks to prove her identity while real-world violence closes in.

title: Life Is Beautiful
text: An Italian Jewish man uses humor and imagination to shield his young son from the horrors of a Nazi concentration camp. He convinces the boy that their imprisonment is an elaborate game with points to be earned, and the grand prize is a real tank. His cheerful deception keeps the child's spirit intact while he faces grim reality.

title: Crouching Tiger Hidden Dragon
text: In ancient China, a legendary warrior entrusts his mystical sword to a friend for safekeeping. When a young aristocratic woman steals it, a chase across rooftops and bamboo forests reveals she has been secretly trained by a fugitive martial arts master. Two parallel stories of duty and forbidden desire unfold through gravity-defying combat.

title: Oldboy
text: A man is inexplicably imprisoned in a private cell for fifteen years with no explanation. When suddenly released, he has five days to discover who locked him up and why. His investigation leads him through a trail of violence toward a shocking revelation about his own past that redefines everything he thought he knew.

title: Seven Samurai
text: A poor farming village hires seven masterless samurai to defend them against bandits who raid their crops every harvest season. The warriors train the reluctant villagers to fight and build fortifications. The final battle in rain and mud is a costly victory that highlights the gap between those who fight and those who reap the benefits.

title: Rashomon
text: A woodcutter, a priest, and a commoner shelter from rain and discuss a disturbing crime. Through flashbacks, four different witnesses give contradictory accounts of a samurai's murder and his wife's assault in a forest. Each version serves the teller's self-interest, and the film leaves the truth deliberately unresolved.

title: Rear Window
text: A photographer confined to a wheelchair with a broken leg passes time watching his neighbors through his apartment window. He becomes convinced he has witnessed a murder in the building across the courtyard. With the help of his girlfriend and his nurse, he investigates from his window while the suspected killer grows suspicious.

title: Psycho
text: A woman steals money from her employer and flees by car, stopping for the night at a remote motel run by a quiet young man dominated by his mother. After a shocking murder in the shower, a private investigator and the woman's sister search for her. The motel hides a disturbing secret in the house on the hill.

title: Vertigo
text: A retired detective with a fear of heights is hired to follow a friend's wife who seems possessed by a dead woman's spirit. He falls in love with her but fails to prevent her apparent suicide at a bell tower. When he encounters a woman who looks identical, his obsession drives him to remake her into the woman he lost.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
text: Millions of years after a mysterious black monolith triggers the evolution of apes into tool users, an identical object is discovered buried on the Moon. A spacecraft is sent to Jupiter to investigate, but the ship's artificial intelligence begins to malfunction and turns against the crew. The sole survivor encounters something beyond human comprehension.

title: Blade Runner
text: In a rain-soaked future Los Angeles, a retired detective is forced back into service to hunt four escaped bioengineered humans who have returned to Earth seeking more life from their creator. As he tracks them through neon-lit streets, he begins to question the moral difference between hunting them and being one of them.

title: Blade Runner 2049
text: Thirty years after the original, a new blade runner discovers a buried secret that could unravel society. His investigation leads him to a former blade runner who disappeared decades ago. The search raises questions about what makes someone real as both corporate power and a replicant underground race to control the truth.

title: Her
text: A lonely man going through a divorce purchases a new artificially intelligent operating system. He develops a deep romantic relationship with the system's warm and curious personality. As the AI evolves far beyond human capacity, the relationship tests the boundaries of what love and connection mean when one partner has no physical body.

title: Ex Machina
text: A young programmer wins a contest to spend a week at the remote estate of a reclusive tech billionaire. He is asked to evaluate whether a beautiful humanoid robot possesses true artificial intelligence. As the sessions progress, he begins to doubt who is really being tested and who is manipulating whom.

title: Arrival
text: When twelve alien spacecraft land at locations around the world, a linguist is recruited by the military to communicate with the visitors. As she learns their circular written language, she begins experiencing visions of the future. The key to preventing a global war lies in understanding how the aliens perceive time itself.

title: District 9
text: Alien refugees stranded on Earth for twenty years are confined to a squalid camp outside Johannesburg. A bureaucrat tasked with relocating them is accidentally exposed to alien biotechnology that begins transforming his body. Hunted by his own government and a Nigerian crime lord, he must ally with the aliens he once despised.

title: Gravity
text: Two astronauts are stranded in orbit after debris from a destroyed satellite shreds their space shuttle during a routine spacewalk. With dwindling oxygen and no communication with Earth, they must navigate between space stations using only a jetpack and their wits to find a way back to the planet's surface.

title: The Martian
text: An astronaut is presumed dead and left behind on Mars when a dust storm forces his crew to evacuate. Stranded alone with limited supplies, he uses his botany and engineering skills to grow food, manufacture water, and establish communication with Earth. NASA and his crew mount a daring rescue mission across the solar system.

title: Moon
text: A solitary worker nears the end of a three-year contract mining helium on the far side of the Moon with only an AI companion. After an accident, he discovers a disturbing truth about the nature of his employment and identity. The station holds secrets that his corporate employer never intended him to find.

title: Primer
text: Two engineers accidentally build a time machine in their garage while working on a side project. They begin using it for financial gain but quickly lose track of how many versions of themselves exist. The increasingly paranoid narrative fragments as the characters can no longer trust their own timelines or each other.

title: Groundhog Day
text: A cynical television weatherman is sent to cover a small town's annual groundhog ceremony and finds himself reliving the same day over and over. Initially he exploits the loop for selfish gain, then sinks into despair. He eventually uses the infinite repetition to become a genuinely better person and win the heart of his producer.

title: The Sixth Sense
text: A child psychologist takes on the case of a frightened boy who claims to see dead people walking around like living ones. As the psychologist tries to help the boy cope with his terrifying ability, he confronts his own unresolved issues from a violent encounter with a former patient. The truth redefines everything that came before.

title: Se7en
text: Two detectives, one a weary veteran days from retirement and the other an ambitious newcomer, investigate a series of murders each modeled on one of the seven deadly sins. The killer's elaborate crime scenes reveal a methodical and deeply disturbed mind. The final sin is the most devastating and personal of all.

title: Zodiac
text: A cartoonist at a San Francisco newspaper becomes obsessed with tracking the Zodiac serial killer who taunts police with coded letters and calls. Over decades the investigation consumes his career and marriage as the case remains officially unsolved. The film follows the real historical investigation and the toll of obsession.

title: Sicario
text: An idealistic FBI agent is recruited to a covert task force targeting a Mexican drug cartel. Operating in the lawless border region, she discovers the mission's true scope goes far beyond what she was told. She confronts the moral compromises of a shadow war where the rules of engagement have been abandoned.

title: The Big Short
text: A handful of outsiders in the financial world independently discover that the American housing market is built on fraudulent loans and will collapse. They bet against the market through complex financial instruments while everyone else ignores the warning signs. When the crash comes in 2008, they profit from a catastrophe that devastates millions.

title: Spotlight
text: A team of investigative journalists at a Boston newspaper uncovers systematic child abuse by Catholic priests and the institutional cover-up that protected them for decades. Their methodical reporting reveals the scope of the scandal extends far beyond a few individuals. The story earns the paper a Pulitzer and forces accountability.

title: Moonlight
text: A young Black man growing up in a rough Miami neighborhood is shown across three stages of his life. As a child he finds a father figure in a drug dealer. As a teenager he experiences his first love with a male classmate. As an adult he has hardened into a drug dealer himself but reconnects with that lost love.

title: Slumdog Millionaire
text: A teenager from the Mumbai slums appears on a television quiz show and is accused of cheating when he keeps answering correctly. Under police interrogation, he explains how each answer connects to a specific event in his harrowing life story. His experiences of poverty, crime, and lost love have accidentally given him every answer.

title: The Revenant
text: A frontiersman on a fur trading expedition in the 1820s American wilderness is mauled by a bear and left for dead by his companions. Driven by the murder of his son, he survives alone through brutal winter conditions. He crawls, rides rivers, and fights starvation across hundreds of miles to reach the man who betrayed him.

title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
text: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland where gasoline is the most precious commodity, a lone drifter encounters a small community of settlers defending an oil refinery from a marauding gang. He reluctantly agrees to help them escape with their fuel by driving a tanker truck through a gauntlet of armored vehicles and warriors.

title: Singin' in the Rain
text: A silent film star must adapt to talking pictures when the technology arrives in Hollywood. His female co-star has a terrible voice that threatens to ruin their first sound film. Along with his comedian best friend and a talented young singer they meet by chance, they devise a plan to dub the voice and save the production.

title: La La Land
text: An aspiring actress working as a barista and a jazz pianist playing restaurant background music fall in love in Los Angeles. They encourage each other's dreams but as both begin to succeed, their ambitions pull them in different directions. The film ends with a bittersweet fantasy of the life they might have shared.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
text: A middle-aged Chinese-American laundromat owner being audited by the IRS discovers she can access the skills and memories of herself in parallel universes. She must use this ability to fight a nihilistic force threatening all of reality. The multiverse adventure becomes a story about a mother and daughter reconnecting across infinite possibilities.

title: Oppenheimer
text: The story of the theoretical physicist who led the secret project to build the first atomic bomb during World War Two. After the weapon is used on Japan, he faces a security hearing driven by political enemies who question his loyalty. The film contrasts the thrill of scientific discovery with the moral weight of creating a weapon of mass destruction.

title: The Pianist
text: A Polish-Jewish pianist survives the Warsaw ghetto and the destruction of the city during World War Two. Separated from his family during deportations, he hides alone in abandoned apartments, slowly starving. A German officer who discovers him hiding in ruins is moved by his playing and secretly brings him food until the war ends.

title: Birdman
text: A washed-up actor famous for playing a superhero tries to reclaim artistic credibility by writing, directing, and starring in a Broadway play. As opening night approaches, his ego, relationships, and sanity unravel. The film is shot to appear as one continuous take as he argues with the superhero voice in his head.

title: The Shape of Water
text: A mute cleaning woman at a secretive government laboratory discovers an amphibious creature being held captive for Cold War research. She forms a bond with it through music and hard-boiled eggs. With help from her neighbor and a coworker, she plots to rescue the creature before it is vivisected.

title: 12 Years a Slave
text: A free Black man living with his family in New York State in 1841 is kidnapped and sold into slavery in Louisiana. For twelve years he endures brutal plantation conditions while maintaining hope of rescue. His story exposes the systematic cruelty of American slavery through the eyes of someone who knew freedom and had it stolen.

title: Rocky
text: A small-time boxer and debt collector in Philadelphia gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to fight the heavyweight champion of the world. With only weeks to train, he pushes himself through grueling workouts including running up the steps of the art museum. The fight is not really about winning but about proving he can go the distance.

title: Ratatouille
text: A rat with an exceptional sense of taste and smell dreams of becoming a chef in Paris. He forms a secret partnership with a clumsy garbage boy at a famous restaurant, controlling his movements from under his chef hat. Together they create extraordinary dishes while hiding the truth from the kitchen staff and a feared food critic.

title: Inside Out
text: The emotions inside an eleven-year-old girl's mind are personified as colorful characters who operate a control console. When the family moves to a new city, Joy and Sadness are accidentally ejected from headquarters into the vast landscape of long-term memory. They must find their way back before the girl's personality crumbles.

title: Finding Nemo
text: An overprotective clownfish crosses the entire ocean to rescue his son who was captured by a scuba diver and placed in a fish tank at a dentist's office in Sydney. Along the way he teams up with a blue tang fish with severe short-term memory loss. Father and son both learn that sometimes you have to let go.

title: Monsters Inc.
text: In a world where monsters power their city by scaring children at night through closet doors, the top scarer and his one-eyed assistant accidentally let a human toddler into their world. They must return her while evading a scheming rival and discover that children's laughter produces far more energy than screams.

title: Zootopia
text: A rabbit from a farming community becomes the first of her kind to join the police force of a large mammal metropolis. Partnered with a con artist fox, she uncovers a conspiracy behind a string of missing predator cases. Their investigation challenges the city's assumptions about which animals are naturally dangerous.

title: Grave of the Fireflies
text: A teenage boy and his young sister struggle to survive in the final months of World War Two in Japan after firebombing destroys their home and kills their mother. Rejected by relatives and too proud to beg, they take shelter in an abandoned hillside bunker. Starvation slowly takes its toll as the war grinds on.

title: Your Name
text: A teenage boy in Tokyo and a teenage girl in rural Japan mysteriously begin swapping bodies every few days. They communicate through notes and phone memos, gradually developing feelings for each other. When the boy tries to meet the girl in person, he discovers a devastating truth about the timeline they inhabit.

title: Sholay
text: Two petty criminals are hired by a retired police officer to capture the ruthless bandit who murdered his family and cut off his arms. They travel to a remote village terrorized by the bandit and his gang. What begins as a job for reward money becomes personal when both men fall in love and the stakes turn deadly.

title: Mother India
text: A woman in rural India endures a lifetime of hardship after her husband abandons the family. She raises her sons alone, fights floods and famine, resists a moneylender's exploitation, and becomes a pillar of the village. When her younger son turns to banditry, she faces the ultimate test of duty over maternal love.

title: Pather Panchali
text: A poor Bengali family struggles to survive in their crumbling ancestral home in a rural village. Through the eyes of a young boy, we see the rhythms of daily life, his elderly aunt's decline, his sister's resilience, and his mother's desperate pride. The family's hopes rest on the absent father who has gone to the city seeking work.

title: The Lunchbox
text: A young housewife in Mumbai prepares an elaborate lunch for her husband hoping to rekindle their marriage, but the city's famously accurate lunchbox delivery system sends it to the wrong person. A lonely widower about to retire begins receiving her meals and they start exchanging notes inside the lunchbox, developing an unexpected connection.

title: Taxi Driver
text: A mentally unstable Vietnam War veteran works as a nighttime taxi driver in a decaying New York City. Disgusted by the crime and sleaze he sees nightly, he fixates on rescuing a teenage sex worker and assassinating a political candidate. His isolation and rage build toward an explosion of violence.

title: Apocalypse Now
text: During the Vietnam War, an Army captain is sent on a classified mission up a Cambodian river to find and terminate a rogue Special Forces colonel who has gone insane and established his own army in the jungle. The journey upstream becomes an increasingly surreal descent into the madness and moral chaos of war.

title: Casablanca
text: An American nightclub owner in wartime Morocco is reunited with a former lover who arrives with her husband, a resistance leader fleeing the Nazis. The club owner possesses transit letters that could get the couple to safety. He must choose between his own broken heart and the larger fight against tyranny.

title: It's a Wonderful Life
text: A generous but frustrated small-town banker is about to end his life on Christmas Eve when a guardian angel intervenes. The angel shows him what his town and loved ones would look like if he had never existed. Seeing the profound impact of his ordinary life transforms his despair into gratitude.

title: The Wizard of Oz
text: A Kansas farm girl is swept away by a tornado to a magical land of color and strange creatures. To find her way home she must follow a yellow brick road to meet a powerful wizard, collecting companions along the way. Each companion seeks something they believe they lack but already possess.

title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
text: A gentle alien botanist is accidentally stranded on Earth and discovered by a lonely ten-year-old boy who hides it in his bedroom. As the boy and his siblings bond with the creature, government agents close in. The alien grows sick and the boy must help it contact its ship before the authorities capture it.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
text: A shape-shifting liquid metal assassin is sent from the future to kill a teenage boy destined to lead humanity's resistance against machines. A reprogrammed robot identical to the one that previously tried to kill the boy's mother is sent back to protect him. Mother, son, and machine try to prevent a nuclear war before it begins.

title: The Princess Bride
text: A farmhand sets out to rescue his true love after she is kidnapped and forced to marry a cruel prince. He battles a giant, outwits a genius, and duels an expert swordsman, surviving each encounter through cleverness and determination. The adventure is framed as a story a grandfather reads to his sick grandson.

title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
text: King Arthur and his knights embark on a quest for the Holy Grail, encountering absurd obstacles including a killer rabbit, knights who demand shrubbery, a bridge keeper who asks trick questions, and a French castle that taunts them. The quest is repeatedly interrupted by modern-day police investigating an actual murder.

title: The Thing
text: A research team at a remote Antarctic station encounters an alien organism that can perfectly imitate any living creature. Paranoia consumes the group as they realize any one of them could be the alien in disguise. They must find a way to identify and destroy it before it reaches civilization and assimilates all life on Earth.

title: Andhadhun
text: A pianist in India pretends to be blind to improve his musical focus and earn sympathy tips. When he inadvertently witnesses a murder during a private performance, his fake blindness becomes his only protection. A darkly comic chain of events pulls him deeper into a conspiracy involving the killer, organ traffickers, and a corrupt doctor.

title: Tumbbad
text: Across three generations, a family in rural India is cursed by their ancestor's greed. The patriarch discovers a tunnel beneath a decaying mansion where a trapped deity guards an endless supply of gold coins. Each trip into the tunnel risks awakening the creature, and the treasure's price grows steeper with every visit.

title: Gully Boy
text: A young man from the Mumbai slums discovers hip-hop and begins writing rap lyrics about life in the tenements. Mentored by a local rapper and supported by his girlfriend, he enters an underground rap battle competition. His music becomes a voice for the frustrations of an entire community trapped by poverty and caste.

title: Barfi
text: A deaf and mute young man in Darjeeling charms everyone around him with his physical comedy and genuine warmth. His life intertwines with two women across several years. One is a conventional girl pressured by her family, the other is autistic and withdrawn. The film moves between timelines as a police investigation frames the story.

title: Drishyam
text: A cable TV operator who learned everything from watching movies must protect his family after his teenage daughter accidentally kills the son of the local police chief. Using techniques he picked up from crime thrillers, he fabricates an elaborate alibi and manipulates evidence. The police chief suspects him but cannot crack his carefully constructed story.

title: Chak De India
text: A disgraced former hockey captain who was falsely accused of match-fixing is given a chance at redemption as coach of the national women's hockey team. He must transform a fractious group of players divided by regional rivalries into a unified squad capable of winning the World Cup. The team's journey mirrors his own fight for honor.

title: The Intouchables
text: A wealthy French quadriplegic hires an unlikely caretaker from the housing projects who has no qualifications but plenty of irreverent energy. Their friendship across class and cultural lines transforms both men. The caretaker refuses to treat his employer with pity, which is exactly what the man needs to feel alive again.

title: Life of Pi
text: After a shipwreck, a teenage boy is stranded on a lifeboat in the Pacific Ocean with a Bengal tiger for 227 days. He must keep the tiger fed enough to prevent it from eating him while navigating storms and dwindling supplies. When finally rescued, he tells an alternate version of events that forces the listener to choose which story to believe.

title: Gone Girl
text: On his fifth wedding anniversary, a man reports his wife missing. As the investigation unfolds, the media and public turn against him as evidence mounts that he killed her. The narrative alternates between his account and her diary entries, revealing that the truth about their marriage is far more sinister than either version suggests.

title: Prisoners
text: When two young girls vanish from a suburban neighborhood, a desperate father takes matters into his own hands after police release the prime suspect due to lack of evidence. He kidnaps and tortures the suspect in an abandoned building while a detective follows his own leads through a maze of clues and dead ends.

title: Nightcrawler
text: A petty thief discovers the lucrative world of freelance crime journalism in Los Angeles. Armed with a police scanner and a camera, he races to accident scenes and crime sites to capture graphic footage for morning news broadcasts. His ambition pushes him to increasingly unethical lengths to get the most dramatic shots.

title: The Usual Suspects
text: After a devastating explosion on a ship, the sole survivor is interrogated by police and recounts the elaborate heist that led to the disaster. Five career criminals were brought together by a mysterious mastermind known only by reputation. As the story unfolds, the detective realizes the narrative may be an elaborate fabrication.

title: Shutter Island
text: Two US marshals travel to a remote psychiatric facility on an island to investigate a patient's disappearance. The lead marshal, haunted by his wife's death, begins to suspect the institution is conducting sinister experiments. As a hurricane traps them on the island, reality itself becomes unreliable.

title: The Conjuring
text: Paranormal investigators are called to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their isolated farmhouse. The family experiences escalating supernatural events including sleepwalking, unexplained bruises, and clocks stopping at the same time. The investigators discover the house has a long history of death and that a witch's curse is responsible.

title: A Quiet Place
text: A family survives in a post-apocalyptic world where blind creatures with hypersensitive hearing hunt anything that makes sound. They communicate in sign language, walk barefoot on sand paths, and live in constant silent tension. When the mother becomes pregnant, the approaching birth threatens their carefully maintained silence.

title: Hereditary
text: After the death of her secretive grandmother, a family begins to unravel as increasingly disturbing events occur in their home. A mother who builds miniature dioramas starts seeing visions. A tragic accident accelerates the family's descent as something ancient and malevolent manipulates them toward a horrifying predetermined fate.

title: Jojo Rabbit
text: A lonely German boy during World War Two has an imaginary friend who is a buffoonish version of the country's dictator. When he discovers his mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their attic, his worldview begins to crack. The satirical comedy becomes a story about a child choosing love over hatred.

title: Whale Rider
text: A young Maori girl in New Zealand believes she is destined to lead her people, but her grandfather clings to the tradition that only a male heir can become chief. She secretly learns the ancestral arts he refuses to teach her. Her determination eventually forces the old man to see that tradition and change can coexist.

title: The Green Mile
text: A death row corrections officer in 1930s Louisiana encounters a gentle giant convicted of murdering two young girls. The enormous prisoner turns out to possess supernatural healing powers. The officer must reconcile executing a man he believes is innocent and possibly miraculous with the demands of the justice system.

title: Cast Away
text: A driven package delivery executive is stranded alone on a deserted Pacific island after a plane crash. Over four years he learns to make fire, catch fish, and maintain his sanity. His only companion is a volleyball with a face drawn in blood. His rescue forces him to confront that the world moved on without him.

title: The Pursuit of Happyness
text: A struggling salesman invests his life savings in portable bone density scanners that doctors do not want to buy. After his wife leaves and he loses his apartment, he and his young son cycle through homeless shelters while he competes for an unpaid internship at a prestigious brokerage firm. Determination and a Rubik's Cube earn him the position.

title: Good Will Hunting
text: A janitor at a prestigious university solves advanced mathematics problems left on hallway blackboards. When his talent is discovered, a professor pairs him with a therapist to address the emotional damage from his abusive childhood. The janitor must decide whether to use his gifts or continue hiding behind his working-class identity.

title: Dead Poets Society
text: A charismatic English teacher at a strict New England boarding school inspires his students to think independently and seize the day. The boys revive a secret poetry club and begin to challenge the conservative expectations of their families and institution. When tragedy strikes, the school administration blames the teacher's influence.

title: Rain Man
text: A self-centered car dealer discovers that his recently deceased father left a multimillion dollar fortune to an older brother he never knew existed. The brother is an autistic savant living in an institution. The dealer effectively kidnaps his brother and drives cross-country, gradually developing genuine affection during the journey.

title: Bohemian Rhapsody
text: The story of a young Parsi immigrant in 1970s London who joins a struggling band as their lead vocalist and transforms them into one of the greatest rock groups in history. His extraordinary vocal range and stage presence bring global fame, while his personal life is marked by struggles with identity, relationships, and illness.

title: Ford v Ferrari
text: An American car designer and a fearless British racing driver build a revolutionary race car for a major automaker to challenge the dominant Italian team at the 1966 Le Mans twenty-four hour race. They battle both their competitor on the track and corporate interference from executives who want to control the program.

title: Hacksaw Ridge
text: A combat medic who refused to carry a weapon serves in one of the bloodiest battles of the Pacific War. His fellow soldiers initially mock his pacifist beliefs, but during the battle he single-handedly rescues seventy-five wounded men by lowering them one by one down a cliff face while under enemy fire.

title: Soul
text: A middle school music teacher gets his big break to play piano at a famous jazz club but falls into a manhole and his soul is separated from his body. In a cosmic realm where new souls develop their personalities before birth, he must mentor an uncooperative soul while finding a way back to his life.

title: Coda
text: The only hearing member in a deaf family discovers she has a gift for singing. Torn between her obligation to her parents who rely on her as their interpreter for their fishing business and her dreams of attending a music conservatory, she must prove to her family that their survival does not require her sacrifice.

title: Dunkirk
text: Allied soldiers from multiple countries are surrounded by enemy forces on the beaches and harbor of a French coastal town early in World War Two. The evacuation unfolds across three timelines: one week on the beach, one day on the sea as civilian boats sail to help, and one hour in the air as fighter pilots provide cover.
